user.title: Connect Emby server
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to your local Emby server. The API key is stored in Home Assistant and redacted from diagnostics.

reconfigure.title: Edit connection
reconfigure.description: Change the server address, port, HTTPS setting or API key. Leave the API-key field empty to keep the stored key.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Emby server.

abort.already_configured: This Emby server is already configured.
abort.unique_id_mismatch: The new connection belongs to another Emby server.

init.title: Manage EMBi
init.description:
Manage Home Assistant players, Emby sensors, and the two separated cleanup paths.

{server_history} Emby server-history records
{ha_players} registered Home Assistant players
{protected} playing or paused
{server_missing} no longer reported by Emby
Emby sensors: {sensor_enabled} of {sensor_total} enabled
Automatic cleanup: {automatic_cleanup} · {automatic_age} days
Next run: {next_run}

{apply_notice}

ha_players.title: Home Assistant players
ha_players.description:
Set global player rules and optionally open a group. OK changes only the draft; permanent storage happens through Review changes.

{ha_players} registered players
{playing} playing or paused
{known_users} recognized users
{server_missing} no longer reported by Emby

data_description.only_during_playback: When enabled, players appear only while playing or paused.
data_description.auto_show_new_players: When disabled, current visible players remain allowed and new players stay hidden until selected.
data_description.technical_access_visibility: The master switch controls whether the technical group and its entities are exposed. Individual technical exceptions remain stored independently.
data_description.selected_group: Known access times are sorted oldest first; unknown times remain at the end.

player_group.title: {group}
player_group.description: {count} players belong to this group. Labels use Device · App · last access. Safe submitted switches remain in the draft. Active blockers: {blocked_players}

player_exceptions.title: Manage exceptions
player_exceptions.description:
Only the current page is changed.

{count} matching players · page {page} of {pages}

player_details.title: Player details
player_details.description:
Technical information for the previously selected player.

{details}

automatic_cleanup.title: Automatic cleanup

data.server_auto_cleanup_remove_ha_entities: Also remove matching Home Assistant players

data_description.server_auto_cleanup_remove_ha_entities: A matching player is removed only after successful server deletion and fresh ownership, remaining-history, and playback validation.

server_history_check.title: Delete individual Emby server records
server_history_check.description:
{total} records checked
{candidates} safe inactive records selectable
{active} protected by playback or an unclear state
{without_activity} protected because no reliable activity timestamp exists

Manual selection is independent of the automatic age threshold.

confirm_server_deletion.title: Delete {count} Emby records?
confirm_server_deletion.description:
{count} records were selected. Scope: {scope}. Identity, activity, and playback are revalidated.

{details}

manage_ha_players.title: Remove Home Assistant players
manage_ha_players.description:
{ha_players} registered players
{removable} removable
{protected} protected
{server_missing} no longer reported
Page {page} of {pages}

confirm_ha_removal.title: Remove {count} Home Assistant players?
confirm_ha_removal.description: The selected players are hidden in EMBi and removed only after fresh ownership and playback validation.

restore_ha_players.title: Restore Home Assistant players
restore_ha_players.description: {candidates} hidden players can be restored · page {page} of {pages}. Restoration preserves the stable unique ID.

review_changes.title: Review changes

older_rules.title: Older rules
older_rules.description: {count} older rules remain preserved and inactive until reviewed.

sensors.title: Emby sensors
sensors.description: Enabled sensors: {enabled} of {total}. OK changes only the draft.

error.cannot_connect: Current Emby and Home Assistant data could not be refreshed. Try again or go back.
error.playback_protected: Stop playback before hiding or removing this player.
error.playback_protected_named: Not hidden because playback is active: {blocked_players}
error.invalid_age: Choose a preset or enter a valid custom number of days.
error.invalid_selection: The selected target changed or is no longer safe. Refresh and try again.
error.unsaved_changes: Apply or discard the current draft before starting a destructive action.
error.storage_failed: The maintenance state could not be saved. No options were applied.
error.save_failed: The changes could not be saved safely. No reload was performed.

abort.apply_complete: Changes saved. EMBi is completing one planned reload and exact lifecycle follow-up.
abort.ha_player_removal_complete: Player removal completed. Requested: {requested}. Removed: {removed}. Protected: {protected}. Failed: {failed}.
abort.ha_player_restore_complete: Player restoration completed. Requested: {requested}. Restored: {restored}. Failed: {failed}.
